title: limonium retirameum subsp. retirameum
intro: Limonium retirameum subsp. retirameum is a subspecies of the Limonium plant, also known as sea lavender, which is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Limonium retirameum subsp. retirameum typically involve infusing the flowers in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
